textEn: I swear by the Day of Resurrection,
and I swear by the self-reproaching soul!
textTranslit: Wa laaa uqsimu bin nafsil lawwaamah

textEn: Does man think that We cannot reassemble his bones?

textAr: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
textEn: In fact, We are able to restore even his very fingertips.
But man desires to persist in sin,
and asks [mockingly], “When is the Day of Resurrection?”
But when the sight is dazzled,
and the moon is darkened,
and the sun and the moon are brought together,
on that Day man will say, “Where is the escape?”
textTranslit: Yaqoolul insaanu yaw ma 'izin aynal mafarr

textEn: No indeed! There will be no refuge.
On that Day all will end up before your Lord.

textAr: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
textEn: On that Day man will be informed of what he has sent forth and left behind.
textTranslit: Yunabba 'ul insaanu yawma 'izim bimaa qaddama wa akhkhar

textEn: In fact, man will be a witness against himself,
despite the excuses he may put forward.

textAr: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
textEn: Do not move your tongue [O Prophet] in haste trying to memorize it.
textTranslit: Laa tuharrik bihee lisaa naka lita'jala bih

textEn: It is upon Us to make you memorize and recite it.
Then when We recite it [through Gabriel], follow its recitation attentively;
textTranslit: Fa izaa qaraanaahu fattabi' qur aanah

textEn: then it is upon Us to explain its meanings.
No indeed! You [people] love this fleeting world,
and neglect the Hereafter.
On that Day some faces will be bright,
looking at their Lord.
And on that Day, some faces will be gloomy,
knowing that a crushing calamity will befall them.
Indeed, when the soul reaches the throat,
and it is said, “Is there any healer?”
And he realizes that it is time to depart,
when legs are brought together [in a shroud];
on that Day, he will be driven to your Lord.
He neither believed nor prayed;
rather he denied and turned away,
then he went to his people, elated with pride,
Woe to you, and woe!
Again, woe to you, and woe!
Does man think that he will be left neglected?

textAr: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ
textEn: Was he not once a drop of semen emitted,
textTranslit: Alam yaku nutfatam mim maniyyiny yumnaa

textEn: then he became a clinging clot, then He created him and perfected his form,
and made from him both genders, male and female?
textTranslit: Faja'ala minhuz zawjayniz zakara wal unsaa

textAr: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
textEn: Is not He able to bring the dead back to life?
textTranslit: Alaisa zaalika biqaadirin 'alaaa any yuhyiyal mawtaa
